character.name: Male samurai, black hair tied
character.prompt:
Male samurai, black hair tied in topknot, lean athletic build. All-dark
outfit: dark gray-black gi jacket, dark pants, dark boots, dark arm
wraps. Katana sheathed on back, second short blade at hip. Cold silver-
blue shimmer on sword edge only. Stoic, disciplined stance. No flame,
no purple. Dark fantasy pixel art, Diablo 2 / Hades style, heavy black
outline, muted palette with silver-blue edge accent, transparent background.
